title: Atomic Bomb
description: This Project adds an atomic bomb which can be used as a fun troll to prank your friends!
body:
The Atomic Bomb Mod is a Minecraft mod that gives you full control over where an atomic explosion happens in your world. Instead of placing TNT or trying to line things up manually, you can simply open the mod’s GUI, adjust the X, Y, and Z sliders, and launch a bomb directly at those coordinates.

The goal of the mod is to make large-scale explosions both fun and easy to control. It’s still a work in progress, but the core features are already working: you select a location, press the button, and the bomb detonates right where you aimed. More visual effects, customization options, and safety settings are planned as development continues.

If you’ve ever wanted to trigger a massive blast on the other side of the map without having to travel there yourself, this mod is designed exactly for that. Point, set the coordinates, and let the destruction begin.
